synopsis: A dynamic vortex of hyper-saturated chromatic energy spirals and expands, drawing the viewer into its mesmerizing, ever-changing core.

shots.prompt: A subtle swirl of fiery red and deep orange light slowly begins to form in the center of the frame against a backdrop of dark space, gradually intensifying and expanding.
The swirl rapidly accelerates, pulling in electric yellow and bright magenta, forming a powerful, spiraling vortex of hyper-saturated color, the camera being drawn into its outer edges.

The camera plunges deep into the heart of the chromatic vortex, surrounded by an intense, rapidly shifting tunnel of pure light and color, reds, oranges, and yellows blurring into a blinding, mesmerizing blur, with glimpses of deep blue at the very core.

The intense vortex slowly diffuses and spreads out, the spiraling energy transforming into a vast, gentle aurora of intermingling colors, slowly expanding and fading into an infinite, softly glowing canvas of cosmic dust.
